name: Shivam Autotech Limited
summary: Shivam Autotech Limited manufactures and sells auto transmission components primarily for original equipment manufacturers in India and internationally. It offers transmission gears and shafts; spline shafts; plungers; and power train, alternator, starter motor, magneto, and steering components, as well as various precision engineering components. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Gurugram, India. Shivam Autotech Limited is a subsidiary of Dayanand Munjal Investments Private Limited.
